// 65KB — больше чанки, меньше вызовов\n46\tconst MAX_IMAGE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024;\n47\tconst IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX = 'data:image/';\n48\tconst VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX = 'data:video/';\n49\tconst MESSAGES_KEY = 'chat_messages_v2';\n50\t\n51\t// === ЗАШИФРОВАННОЕ ХРАНИЛИЩЕ ===\n52\tconst storage = new MMKV({\n53\t  id: 'e2ee-chat-v2',\n54\t  encryptionKey: 'e2ee-intimate-app-key-v2',\n55\t});\n56\t\n57\tfunction saveMessages(msgs: ChatMessage[]) {\n58\t  try {\n59\t    const toSave = msgs.slice(0, 300).map(m => ({\n60\t      ...m,\n61\t      // Не храним data URI, только file:// ссылки\n62\t      image: m.image?.startsWith('file://') ? m.image : undefined,\n63\t      video: m.video?.startsWith('file://') ? m.video : undefined,\n64\t    }));\n65\t    storage.set(MESSAGES_KEY, JSON.stringify(toSave));\n66\t  } catch {}\n67\t}\n68\t\n69\tfunction loadMessages(): ChatMessage[] {\n70\t  try {\n71\t    const raw = storage.getString(MESSAGES_KEY);\n72\t    if (!raw) return [];\n73\t    return JSON.parse(raw) as ChatMessage[];\n74\t  } catch { return []; }\n75\t}\n76\t\n77\t// === ШИФРОВАНИЕ (через Buffer, без decodeUTF8 для медиа) ===\n78\tfunction encryptPayload(data: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string {\n79\t  const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n80\t  const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n81\t  const msgBytes = Buffer.from(data, 'utf-8');\n82\t  const nonce = nacl.randomBytes(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n83\t  const encrypted = nacl.box(msgBytes, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n84\t  if (!encrypted) throw new Error('Encryption failed');\n85\t  const full = new Uint8Array(nonce.length + encrypted.length);\n86\t  full.set(nonce);\n87\t  full.set(encrypted, nonce.length);\n88\t  return encodeBase64(full);\n89\t}\n90\t\n91\tfunction decryptPayload(payload: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string | null {\n92\t  try {\n93\t    const full = decodeBase64(payload);\n94\t    const nonce = full.slice(0, nacl.box.nonceLength);\n95\t    const box = full.slice(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n96\t    const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n97\t    const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n98\t    const decrypted = nacl.box.open(box, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n99\t    if (!decrypted) return null;\n100\t    return Buffer.from(decrypted).toString('utf-8');\n101\t  } catch { return null; }\n102\t}\n103\t\n104\t// === ЧАНКОВАЯ ОТПРАВКА ===\n105\tasync function sendChunked(\n106\t  conn: HubConnection,\n107\t  sender: string,\n108\t  recipient: string,\n109\t  encrypted: string,\n110\t): Promise<void> {\n111\t  const total = Math.ceil(encrypted.length / CHUNK_SIZE);\n112\t  if (total === 1) {\n113\t    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, encrypted);\n114\t    return;\n115\t  }\n116\t  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n117\t  for (let i = 0; i < total; i++) {\n118\t    const chunk = encrypted.slice(i * CHUNK_SIZE, (i + 1) * CHUNK_SIZE);\n119\t    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, `__CHUNK__${id}__${i}__${total}__${chunk}`);\n120\t  }\n121\t}\n122\t\n123\t// === МЕДИА ХЕЛПЕРЫ ===\n124\tasync function saveToTempFile(dataUri: string, prefix: string): Promise<string> {\n125\t  const match = dataUri.match(/^data:([^;]+);base64,(.+)$/s);\n126\t  if (!match) return dataUri;\n127\t  const [, mime, b64] = match;\n128\t  const ext = mime.includes('video') ? 'mp4' : mime.includes('png') ? 'png' : 'jpg';\n129\t  const path = `${RNFS.CachesDirectoryPath}/${prefix}_${Date.now()}.${ext}`;\n130\t  await RNFS.writeFile(path, b64, 'base64');\n131\t  return `file://${path}`;\n132\t}\n133\t\n134\tasync function saveToGallery(uri: string) {\n135\t  try {\n136\t    if (Platform.OS === 'android' && Platform.Version < 33) {\n137\t      const granted = await PermissionsAndroid.request(\n138\t        PermissionsAndroid.PERMISSIONS.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,\n139\t      );\n140\t      if (granted !== PermissionsAndroid.RESULTS.GRANTED) {\n141\t        Alert.alert('Нет разрешения');\n142\t        return;\n143\t      }\n144\t    }\n145\t    await CameraRoll.saveAsset(uri, { type: 'auto' });\n146\t    Alert.alert('Сохранено в галерею');\n147\t  } catch {\n148\t    Alert.alert('Не удалось сохранить');\n149\t  }\n150\t}\n151\t\n152\tasync function pickMedia(): Promise<{ uri: string; dataUri: string; type: 'image' | 'video' } | null> {\n153\t  const result = await launchImageLibrary({\n154\t    mediaType: 'mixed',\n155\t    quality: 0.6,\n156\t    includeBase64: true,\n157\t    maxWidth: 1024,\n158\t    maxHeight: 1024,\n159\t    videoQuality: 'low',\n160\t  });\n161\t  if (result.didCancel || result.errorCode) return null;\n162\t  const asset: Asset | undefined = result.assets?.[0];\n163\t  if (!asset) return null;\n164\t\n165\t  const isVideo = asset.type?.startsWith('video/') ?? false;\n166\t\n167\t  if (!isVideo && asset.fileSize && asset.fileSize > MAX_IMAGE_SIZE) {\n168\t    Alert.alert('Фото слишком большое (макс 5 МБ)');\n169\t    return null;\n170\t  }\n171\t\n172\t  let dataUri: string;\n173\t  if (!isVideo && asset.base64) {\n174\t    dataUri = `data:${asset.type || 'image/jpeg'};base64,${asset.base64}`;\n175\t  } else if (asset.uri) {\n176\t    const b64 = await RNFS.readFile(asset.uri, 'base64');\n177\t    const mime = asset.type || (isVideo ? 'video/mp4' : 'image/jpeg');\n178\t    dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${b64}`;\n179\t  } else {\n180\t    return null;\n181\t  }\n182\t\n183\t  const fileUri = await saveToTempFile(dataUri, isVideo ? 'vid' : 'img');\n184\t  return { uri: fileUri, dataUri, type: isVideo ? 'video' : 'image' };\n185\t}\n186\t\n187\t// === КОМПОНЕНТ ===\n188\texport default function ChatScreen(): React.JSX.Element {\n189\t  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();\n190\t  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);\n191\t  const [text, setText] = useState('');\n192\t  const [connected, setConnected] = useState(false);\n193\t  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);\n194\t  const [contactName, setContactName] = useState('');\n195\t\n196\t  const connRef = useRef<HubConnection | null>(null);\n197\t  const myKeyRef = useRef('');\n198\t  const myNameRef = useRef('');\n199\t  const theirKeyRef = useRef('');\n200\t  const chunksRef = useRef<Map<string, string[]>>(new Map());\n201\t  const flatListRef = useRef<FlatList>(null);\n202\t\n203\t  // --- Добавить сообщение ---\n204\t  const addMessage = useCallback((msg: ChatMessage) => {\n205\t    setMessages(prev => {\n206\t      const next = [msg, ...prev];\n207\t      saveMessages(next);\n208\t      return next;\n209\t    });\n210\t  }, []);\n211\t\n212\t  // --- Обработка входящего ---\n213\t  const handleIncoming = useCallback(async (plainText: string) => {\n214\t    const isImg = plainText.startsWith(IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX);\n215\t    const isVid = plainText.startsWith(VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX);\n216\t\n217\t    let image: string | undefined;\n218\t    let video: string | undefined;\n219\t\n220\t    if (isImg) {\n221\t      image = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_img');\n222\t    } else if (isVid) {\n223\t      video = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_vid');\n224\t    }\n225\t\n226\t    addMessage({\n227\t      id: `in-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n228\t      text: isImg || isVid ? '' : plainText,\n229\t      image,\n230\t      video,\n231\t      fromMe: false,\n232\t      timestamp: Date.now(),\n233\t    });\n234\t  }, [addMessage]);\n235\t\n236\t  // --- Инициализация ---\n237\t  useEffect(() => {\n238\t    let dead = false;\n239\t    let conn: HubConnection | null = null;\n240\t\n241\t    (async () => {\n242\t      // Загрузка истории\n243\t      const saved = loadMessages();\n244\t      if (saved.length > 0 && !dead) setMessages(saved);\n245\t\n246\t      const ip = await AsyncStorage.getItem('server_ip');\n247\t      const username = await AsyncStorage.getItem('my_username');\n248\t      const tokenData = await Keychain.getGenericPassword({ service: 'e2e_auth_token' });\n249\t      const privData = await Keychain.getGenericPassword({ service: 'e2e_private_key' });\n250\t\n251\t      if (!ip || !username || !tokenData || !privData) return;\n252\t\n253\t      myNameRef.current = username;\n254\t      myKeyRef.current = privData.password;\n255\t\n256\t      // Загрузка контакта\n257\t      try {\n258\t        const res = await fetch(`${ip}/contact?myUsername=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`);\n259\t        if (res.ok) {\n260\t          const data = await res.json();\n261\t          theirKeyRef.current = data.publicKey;\n262\t          if (!dead) setContactName(data.username);\n263\t        }\n264\t      } catch {}\n265\t\n266\t      // SignalR\n267\t      conn = new HubConnectionBuilder()\n268\t        .withUrl(`${ip}/chathub?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`, {\n269\t          accessTokenFactory: () => tokenData.password,\n270\t          headers: { username },\n271\t        })\n272\t        .withAutomaticReconnect([0, 2000, 5000, 10000, 30000])\n273\t        .build();\n274\t\n275\t      conn.on('ReceiveMessage', async (_sender: string, raw: string) => {\n276\t        if (dead || !theirKeyRef.current) return;\n277\t\n278\t        const cm = raw.match(/^__CHUNK__(.+?)__(\\d+)__(\\d+)__/);\n279\t        if (cm) {\n280\t          const [hdr, msgId, idxS, totS] = cm;\n281\t          const idx = +idxS, tot = +totS;\n282\t          const data = raw.slice(hdr.length);\n283\t          const buf = chunksRef.current;\n284\t          if (!buf.has(msgId)) buf.set(msgId, Array(tot).fill(''));\n285\t          buf.get(msgId)![idx] = data;\n286\t React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';\nimport {\n  View,\n  StyleSheet,\n  Platform,\n  Text,\n  TouchableOpacity,\n  Alert,\n  ActivityIndicator,\n  PermissionsAndroid,\n '@microsoft/signalr';\nimport * as Keychain from 'react-native-keychain';\nimport AsyncStorage from '@react-native-async-storage/async-storage';\nimport { launchImageLibrary, Asset } from 'react-native-image-picker';\nimport RNFS from 'react-native-fs';\nimport nacl from 'tweetnacl';\nimport { encodeBase64, decodeBase64 } from 'tweetnacl-util';\nimport { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';\nimport Video from 'react-native-video';\nimport { MMKV } from 'react-native-mmkv';\nimport { CameraRoll } from '@react-native-camera-roll/camera-roll';\nimport { Buffer } from 'buffer';\n\n// === ТИПЫ ===\ninterface ChatMessage {\n  id: string;\n  text: string;\n  image?: string;\n  video?: string;\n  fromMe: boolean;\n  timestamp: number;\n}\n\n// === КОНСТАНТЫ ===\nconst CHUNK_SIZE = 65000; // 65KB — больше чанки, меньше вызовов\nconst MAX_IMAGE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024;\nconst IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX = 'data:image/';\nconst VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX = 'data:video/';\nconst MESSAGES_KEY = 'chat_messages_v2';\n\n// === ЗАШИФРОВАННОЕ ХРАНИЛИЩЕ ===\nconst storage = new MMKV({\n  id: 'e2ee-chat-v2',\n  encryptionKey: 'e2ee-intimate-app-key-v2',\n});\n\nfunction saveMessages(msgs: ChatMessage[]) {\n  try {\n    const toSave = msgs.slice(0, 300).map(m => ({\n      ...m,\n      // Не храним data URI, только file:// ссылки\n      image: m.image?.startsWith('file://') ? m.image : undefined,\n      video: m.video?.startsWith('file://') ? m.video : undefined,\n    }));\n    storage.set(MESSAGES_KEY, JSON.stringify(toSave));\n  } catch {}\n}\n\nfunction loadMessages(): ChatMessage[] {\n  try {\n    const raw = storage.getString(MESSAGES_KEY);\n    if (!raw) return [];\n    return JSON.parse(raw) as ChatMessage[];\n  } catch { return []; }\n}\n\n// === ШИФРОВАНИЕ (через Buffer, без decodeUTF8 для медиа) ===\nfunction encryptPayload(data: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string {\n  const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n  const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n  const msgBytes = Buffer.from(data, 'utf-8');\n  const nonce = nacl.randomBytes(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n  const encrypted = nacl.box(msgBytes, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n  if (!encrypted) throw new Error('Encryption failed');\n  const full = new Uint8Array(nonce.length + encrypted.length);\n  full.set(nonce);\n  full.set(encrypted, nonce.length);\n  return encodeBase64(full);\n}\n\nfunction decryptPayload(payload: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string | null {\n  try {\n    const full = decodeBase64(payload);\n    const nonce = full.slice(0, nacl.box.nonceLength);\n    const box = full.slice(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n    const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n    const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n    const decrypted = nacl.box.open(box, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n    if (!decrypted) return null;\n    return Buffer.from(decrypted).toString('utf-8');\n  } catch { return null; }\n}\n\n// === ЧАНКОВАЯ ОТПРАВКА ===\nasync function sendChunked(\n  conn: HubConnection,\n  sender: string,\n  recipient: string,\n  encrypted: string,\n): Promise<void> {\n  const total = Math.ceil(encrypted.length / CHUNK_SIZE);\n  if (total === 1) {\n    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, encrypted);\n    return;\n  }\n  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n  for (let i = 0; i < total; i++) {\n    const chunk = encrypted.slice(i * CHUNK_SIZE, (i + 1) * CHUNK_SIZE);\n    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, `__CHUNK__${id}__${i}__${total}__${chunk}`);\n  }\n}\n\n// === МЕДИА ХЕЛПЕРЫ ===\nasync function saveToTempFile(dataUri: string, prefix: string): Promise<string> {\n  const match = dataUri.match(/^data:([^;]+);base64,(.+)$/s);\n  if (!match) return dataUri;\n  const [, mime, b64] = match;\n  const ext = mime.includes('video') ? 'mp4' : mime.includes('png') ? 'png' : 'jpg';\n  const path = `${RNFS.CachesDirectoryPath}/${prefix}_${Date.now()}.${ext}`;\n  await RNFS.writeFile(path, b64, 'base64');\n  return `file://${path}`;\n}\n\nasync function saveToGallery(uri: string) {\n  try {\n    if (Platform.OS === 'android' && Platform.Version < 33) {\n      const granted = await PermissionsAndroid.request(\n        PermissionsAndroid.PERMISSIONS.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,\n      );\n      if (granted !== PermissionsAndroid.RESULTS.GRANTED) {\n        Alert.alert('Нет разрешения');\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n    await CameraRoll.saveAsset(uri, { type: 'auto' });\n    Alert.alert('Сохранено в галерею');\n  } catch {\n    Alert.alert('Не удалось сохранить');\n  }\n}\n\nasync function pickMedia(): Promise<{ uri: string; dataUri: string; type: 'image' | 'video' } | null> {\n  const result = await launchImageLibrary({\n    mediaType: 'mixed',\n    quality: 0.6,\n    includeBase64: true,\n    maxWidth: 1024,\n    maxHeight: 1024,\n    videoQuality: 'low',\n  });\n  if (result.didCancel || result.errorCode) return null;\n  const asset: Asset | undefined = result.assets?.[0];\n  if (!asset) return null;\n\n  const isVideo = asset.type?.startsWith('video/') ?? false;\n\n  if (!isVideo && asset.fileSize && asset.fileSize > MAX_IMAGE_SIZE) {\n    Alert.alert('Фото слишком большое (макс 5 МБ)');\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  let dataUri: string;\n  if (!isVideo && asset.base64) {\n    dataUri = `data:${asset.type || 'image/jpeg'};base64,${asset.base64}`;\n  } else if (asset.uri) {\n    const b64 = await RNFS.readFile(asset.uri, 'base64');\n    const mime = asset.type || (isVideo ? 'video/mp4' : 'image/jpeg');\n    dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${b64}`;\n  } else {\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  const fileUri = await saveToTempFile(dataUri, isVideo ? 'vid' : 'img');\n  return { uri: fileUri, dataUri, type: isVideo ? 'video' : 'image' };\n}\n\n// === КОМПОНЕНТ ===\nexport default function ChatScreen(): React.JSX.Element {\n  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);\n  const [text, setText] = useState('');\n  const [connected, setConnected] = useState(false);\n  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);\n  const [contactName, setContactName] = useState('');\n\n  const connRef = useRef<HubConnection | null>(null);\n  const myKeyRef = useRef('');\n  const myNameRef = useRef('');\n  const theirKeyRef = useRef('');\n  const chunksRef = useRef<Map<string, string[]>>(new Map());\n  const flatListRef = useRef<FlatList>(null);\n\n  // --- Добавить сообщение ---\n  const addMessage = useCallback((msg: ChatMessage) => {\n    setMessages(prev => {\n      const next = [msg, ...prev];\n      saveMessages(next);\n      return next;\n    });\n  }, []);\n\n  // --- Обработка входящего ---\n  const handleIncoming = useCallback(async (plainText: string) => {\n    const isImg = plainText.startsWith(IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX);\n    const isVid = plainText.startsWith(VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX);\n\n    let image: string | undefined;\n    let video: string | undefined;\n\n    if (isImg) {\n      image = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_img');\n    } else if (isVid) {\n      video = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_vid');\n    }\n\n    addMessage({\n      id: `in-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n      text: isImg || isVid ? '' : plainText,\n      image,\n      video,\n      fromMe: false,\n      timestamp: Date.now(),\n    });\n  }, [addMessage]);\n\n  // --- Инициализация ---\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let dead = false;\n    let conn: HubConnection | null = null;\n\n    (async () => {\n      // Загрузка истории\n      const saved = loadMessages();\n      if (saved.length > 0 && !dead) setMessages(saved);\n\n      const ip = await AsyncStorage.getItem('server_ip');\n      const username = await AsyncStorage.getItem('my_username');\n      const tokenData = await Keychain.getGenericPassword({ service: 'e2e_auth_token' });\n      const privData = await Keychain.getGenericPassword({ service: 'e2e_private_key' });\n\n      if (!ip || !username || !tokenData || !privData) return;\n\n      myNameRef.current = username;\n      myKeyRef.current = privData.password;\n\n      // Загрузка контакта\n      try {\n        const res = await fetch(`${ip}/contact?myUsername=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`);\n        if (res.ok) {\n          const data = await res.json();\n          theirKeyRef.current = data.publicKey;\n          if (!dead) setContactName(data.username);\n        }\n      } catch {}\n\n      // SignalR\n      conn = new HubConnectionBuilder()\n        .withUrl(`${ip}/chathub?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`, {\n          accessTokenFactory: () => tokenData.password,\n          headers: { username },\n        })\n        .withAutomaticReconnect([0, 2000, 5000, 10000, 30000])\n        .build();\n\n      conn.on('ReceiveMessage', async (_sender: string, raw: string) => {\n        if (dead || !theirKeyRef.current) return;\n\n        const cm = raw.match(/^__CHUNK__(.+?)__(\\d+)__(\\d+)__/);\n        if (cm) {\n          const [hdr, msgId, idxS, totS] = cm;\n          const idx = +idxS, tot = +totS;\n          const data = raw.slice(hdr.length);\n          const buf = chunksRef.current;\n          if (!buf.has(msgId)) buf.set(msgId, Array(tot).fill(''));\n          buf.get(msgId)![idx] = data;\n          if (buf.get(msgId)!.every(c => c !== '')) {\n            const full = buf.get(msgId)!.join('');\n            buf.delete(msgId);\n            const plain = decryptPayload(full, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n            if (plain) handleIncoming(plain);\n          }\n        } else {\n          const plain = decryptPayload(raw, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n          if (plain) handleIncoming(plain);\n        }\n      });\n\n      conn.onreconnecting(() => { if (!dead) setConnected(false); });\n      conn.onreconnected(() => { if (!dead) setConnected(true); });\n      conn.onclose(() => { if (!dead) setConnected(false); });\n\n      try {\n        await conn.start();\n        if (dead) { conn.stop(); return; }\n        connRef.current = conn;\n        setConnected(true);\n      } catch {}\n    })();\n\n    return () => { dead = true; conn?.stop().catch(() => {}); connRef.current = null; };\n  }, []); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n\n  // --- Отправка текста ---\n  const handleSendText = useCallback(async () => {\n    const t = text.trim();\n    if (!t) return;\n    setText('');\n\n    addMessage({ id: `out-${Date.now()}`, text: t, fromMe: true, timestamp: Date.now() });\n\n    const conn = connRef.current;\n    if (!conn || conn.state !== HubConnectionState.Connected || !theirKeyRef.current) return;\n\n    try {\n      const enc = encryptPayload(t, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n      await sendChunked(conn, myNameRef.current, contactName, enc);\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error('[Send] error:', e);\n    }\n  }, [text, contactName, addMessage]);\n\n  // --- Отправка медиа ---\n  const handleSendMedia = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      const media = await pickMedia();\n      if (!media) return;\n\n      setSending(true);\n\n      addMessage({\n        id: `out-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n        text: '',\n        image: media.type === 'image' ? media.uri : undefined,\n        video: media.type === 'video' ? media.uri : undefined,\n        fromMe: true,\n        timestamp: Date.now(),\n      });\n\n      const conn = connRef.current;\n      if (!conn || conn.state !== HubConnectionState.Connected || !theirKeyRef.current) {\n        setSending(false);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const enc = encryptPayload(media.dataUri, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n      await sendChunked(conn, myNameRef.current, contactName, enc);\n      setSending(false);\n    } catch (e) {\n      console.error('[Media] error:', e);\n      setSending(false);\n    }\n  }, [contactName, addMessage]);\n\n  // --- Длинное нажатие (сохранить в галерею) ---\n  const handleLongPress = useCallback((msg: ChatMessage) => {\n    const uri = msg.image || msg.video;\n    if (!uri || !uri.startsWith('file://')) return;\n    Alert.alert('Сохранить в галерею?', '', [\n      { text: 'Отмена', style: 'cancel' },\n      { text: 'Сохранить', onPress: () => saveToGallery(uri) },\n    ]);\n  }, []);\n\n  // --- Очистка ---\n  const handleClear = useCallback(() => {\n    Alert.alert('Удалить историю?', 'Все сообщения будут удалены', [\n      { text: 'Отмена', style: 'cancel' },\n      { text: 'Удалить', style: 'destructive', onPress: () => { setMessages([]); storage.delete(MESSAGES_KEY); } },\n    ]);\n  }, []);\n\n  // --- Рендер сообщения ---\n  const renderItem = useCallback(({ item }: ListRenderItemInfo<ChatMessage>) => {\n    const isMe = item.fromMe;\n    return (\n      <TouchableOpacity\n        activeOpacity={0.8}\n        onLongPress={() => handleLongPress(item)}\n        style={[styles.msgRow, isMe ? styles.msgRowRight : styles.msgRowLeft]}\n      >\n        <View style={[styles.bubble, isMe ? styles.bubbleRight : styles.bubbleLeft]}>\n          {item.image && (\n            <Image source={{ uri: item.image }} style={styles.msgImage} resizeMode=\"cover\" />\n          )}\n          {item.video && (\n            <View style={styles.videoWrap}>\n              <Video\n                source={{ uri: item.video }}\n                style={styles.msgVideo}\n                resizeMode=\"contain\"\n                controls\n                paused\n              />\n            </View>\n          )}\n          {!!item.text && (\n            <Text style={[styles.msgText, isMe ? styles.msgTextRight : styles.msgTextLeft]}>\n              {item.text}\n            </Text>\n          )}\n          <Text style={[styles.msgTime, isMe ? styles.msgTimeRight : styles.msgTimeLeft]}>\n            {new Date(item.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}\n          </Text>\n        </View>\n      </TouchableOpacity>\n    );\n  }, [handleLongPress]);\n\n  // --- РЕНДЕР ---\n  const content = (\n    <View style={[styles.container, { paddingTop: insets.top }]}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <View style={styles.header}>\n        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleClear} style={styles.clearBtn}>\n          <Text style={styles.clearBtnText}>X</Text>\n        </TouchableOpacity>\n        <Text style={styles.headerTitle} numberOfLines={1}>\n          {contactName || 'Ожидание...'}\n        </Text>\n        {connected\n          ? <View style={styles.dotOnline} />\n          : <ActivityIndicator size=\"small\" color=\"#E91E63\" />\n        }\n      </View>\n\n      {/* Индикатор отправки */}\n      {sending && (\n        <View style={styles.sendingBar}>\n          <ActivityIndicator size=\"small\" color=\"#E91E63\" />\n          <Text style={styles.sendingBarText}>Отправка...</Text>\n        </View>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Список сообщений */}\n      <FlatList\n        ref={flatListRef}\n        data={messages}\n        renderItem={renderItem}\n        keyExtractor={item => item.id}\n        inverted\n        style={styles.list}\n        contentContainerStyle={styles.listContent}\n        keyboardShouldPersistTaps=\"handled\"\n      />\n\n      {/* Поле ввода */}\n      <View style={[styles.inputBar, { paddingBottom: Math.max(insets.bottom, 8) }]}>\n        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleSendMedia} style={styles.attachBtn}>\n          <Text style={styles.attachBtnText}>+</Text>\n        </TouchableOpacity>\n        <TextInput\n          style={styles.input}\n          value={text}\n          onChangeText={setText}\n          placeholder=\"Сообщение...\"\n          placeholderTextColor=\"#999\"\n          multiline\n          maxLength={5000}\n        />\n        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleSendText} style={styles.sendBtn}>\n          <Text style={styles.sendBtnText}>E2E</Text>\n        </TouchableOpacity>\n      </View>\n    </View>\n  );\n\n  // На iOS оборачиваем в KeyboardAvoidingView, на Android adjustResize справляется\n  if (Platform.OS === 'ios') {\n    return (\n      <KeyboardAvoidingView style={{ flex: 1 }} behavior=\"padding\" keyboardVerticalOffset={0}>\n        {content}\n      </KeyboardAvoidingView>\n    );\n  }\n  return content;\n}\n\n// === СТИЛИ ===\nconst styles = StyleSheet.create({\n  container: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#FFF9FA' },\n  header: {\n    flexDirection: 'row',\n    alignItems: }\n78\t}\n79\t\n80\t// === ШИФРОВАНИЕ (через Buffer, без decodeUTF8 для медиа) ===\n81\tfunction encryptPayload(data: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string {\n82\t  const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n83\t  const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n84\t  const msgBytes = Buffer.from(data, 'utf-8');\n85\t  const nonce = nacl.randomBytes(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n86\t  const encrypted = nacl.box(msgBytes, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n87\t  if (!encrypted) throw new Error('Encryption failed');\n88\t  const full = new Uint8Array(nonce.length + encrypted.length);\n89\t  full.set(nonce);\n90\t  full.set(encrypted, nonce.length);\n91\t  return encodeBase64(full);\n92\t}\n93\t\n94\tfunction decryptPayload(payload: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string | null {\n95\t  try {\n96\t    const full = decodeBase64(payload);\n97\t    const nonce = full.slice(0, nacl.box.nonceLength);\n98\t    const box = full.slice(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n99\t    const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n100\t    const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n101\t    const decrypted = nacl.box.open(box, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n102\t    if (!decrypted) return null;\n103\t    return Buffer.from(decrypted).toString('utf-8');\n104\t  } catch { return null; }\n105\t}\n106\t\n107\t// === ЧАНКОВАЯ ОТПРАВКА ===\n108\tasync function sendChunked(\n109\t  conn: HubConnection,\n110\t  sender: string,\n111\t  recipient: string,\n112\t  encrypted: string,\n113\t): Promise<void> {\n114\t  const total = Math.ceil(encrypted.length / CHUNK_SIZE);\n115\t  if (total === 1) {\n116\t    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, encrypted);\n117\t    return;\n118\t  }\n119\t  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n120\t  for (let i = 0; i < total; i++) {\n121\t    const chunk = encrypted.slice(i * CHUNK_SIZE, (i + 1) * CHUNK_SIZE);\n122\t    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, `__CHUNK__${id}__${i}__${total}__${chunk}`);\n123\t  }\n124\t}\n125\t\n126\t// === МЕДИА ХЕЛПЕРЫ ===\n127\tasync function saveToTempFile(dataUri: string, prefix: string): Promise<string> {\n128\t  const match = dataUri.match(/^data:([^;]+);base64,(.+)$/s);\n129\t  if (!match) return dataUri;\n130\t  const [, mime, b64] = match;\n131\t  const ext = mime.includes('video') ? 'mp4' : mime.includes('png') ? 'png' : 'jpg';\n132\t  const path = `${RNFS.CachesDirectoryPath}/${prefix}_${Date.now()}.${ext}`;\n133\t  await RNFS.writeFile(path, b64, 'base64');\n134\t  return `file://${path}`;\n135\t}\n136\t\n137\tasync function saveToGallery(uri: string) {\n138\t  try {\n139\t    if (Platform.OS === 'android' && Platform.Version < 33) {\n140\t      const granted = await PermissionsAndroid.request(\n141\t        PermissionsAndroid.PERMISSIONS.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,\n142\t      );\n143\t      if (granted !== PermissionsAndroid.RESULTS.GRANTED) {\n144\t        Alert.alert('Нет разрешения');\n145\t        return;\n146\t      }\n147\t    }\n148\t    await CameraRoll.saveAsset(uri, { type: 'auto' });\n149\t    Alert.alert('Сохранено в галерею');\n150\t  } catch {\n151\t    Alert.alert('Не удалось сохранить');\n152\t  }\n153\t}\n154\t\n155\tasync function pickMedia(): Promise<{ uri: string; dataUri: string; type: 'image' | 'video' } | null> {\n156\t  const result = await launchImageLibrary({\n157\t    mediaType: 'mixed',\n158\t    quality: 0.6,\n159\t    includeBase64: true,\n160\t    maxWidth: 1024,\n161\t    maxHeight: 1024,\n162\t    videoQuality: 'low',\n163\t  });\n164\t  if (result.didCancel || result.errorCode) return null;\n165\t  const asset: Asset | undefined = result.assets?.[0];\n166\t  if (!asset) return null;\n167\t\n168\t  const isVideo = asset.type?.startsWith('video/') ?? false;\n169\t\n170\t  if (!isVideo && asset.fileSize && asset.fileSize > MAX_IMAGE_SIZE) {\n171\t    Alert.alert('Фото слишком большое (макс 5 МБ)');\n172\t    return null;\n173\t  }\n174\t\n175\t  let dataUri: string;\n176\t  if (!isVideo && asset.base64) {\n177\t    dataUri = `data:${asset.type || 'image/jpeg'};base64,${asset.base64}`;\n178\t  } else if (asset.uri) {\n179\t    const b64 = await RNFS.readFile(asset.uri, 'base64');\n180\t    const mime = asset.type || (isVideo ? 'video/mp4' : 'image/jpeg');\n181\t    dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${b64}`;\n182\t  } else {\n183\t    return null;\n184\t  }\n185\t\n186\t  const fileUri = await saveToTempFile(dataUri, isVideo ? 'vid' : 'img');\n187\t  return { uri: fileUri, dataUri, type: isVideo ? 'video' : 'image' };\n188\t}\n189\t\n190\t// === КОМПОНЕНТ ===\n191\texport default function ChatScreen(): React.JSX.Element {\n192\t  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();\n193\t  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);\n194\t  const [text, setText] = useState('');\n195\t  const [connected, setConnected] = useState(false);\n196\t  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);\n197\t  const [contactName, setContactName] = useState('');\n198\t  const [viewImage, setViewImage] = useState<string | null>(null);\n199\t\n200\t  const connRef = useRef<HubConnection | null>(null);\n201\t  const myKeyRef = useRef('');\n202\t  const myNameRef = useRef('');\n203\t  const theirKeyRef = useRef('');\n204\t  const chunksRef = useRef<Map<string, string[]>>(new Map());\n205\t  const flatListRef = useRef<FlatList>(null);\n206\t\n207\t  // --- Добавить сообщение ---\n208\t  const addMessage = useCallback((msg: ChatMessage) => {\n209\t    setMessages(prev => {\n210\t      const next = [msg, ...prev];\n211\t      saveMessages(next);\n212\t      return next;\n213\t    });\n214\t  }, []);\n215\t\n216\t  // --- Обработка входящего ---\n217\t  const handleIncoming = useCallback(async (plainText: string) => {\n218\t    const isImg = plainText.startsWith(IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX);\n219\t    const isVid = plainText.startsWith(VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX);\n220\t\n221\t    let image: string | undefined;\n222\t    let video: string | undefined;\n223\t\n224\t    if (isImg) {\n225\t      image = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_img');\n226\t    } else if (isVid) {\n227\t      video = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_vid');\n228\t    }\n229\t\n230\t    addMessage({\n231\t      id: `in-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n232\t      text: isImg || isVid ? '' : plainText,\n233\t      image,\n234\t      video,\n235\t      fromMe: false,\n236\t      timestamp: Date.now(),\n237\t    });\n238\t  }, [addMessage]);\n239\t\n240\t  // --- Инициализация ---\n241\t  useEffect(() => {\n242\t    let dead = false;\n243\t    let conn: HubConnection | null = null;\n244\t\n245\t    (async () => {\n246\t      // Загрузка истории\n247\t      const saved = loadMessages();\n248\t      if (saved.length > 0 && !dead) setMessages(saved);\n249\t\n250\t      const ip = await AsyncStorage.getItem('server_ip');\n251\t      const username = await AsyncStorage.getItem('my_username');\n252\t      const tokenData = await Keychain.getGenericPassword({ service: 'e2e_auth_token' });\n253\t      const privData = await Keychain.getGenericPassword({ service: 'e2e_private_key' });\n254\t\n255\t      if (!ip || !username || !tokenData || !privData) return;\n256\t\n257\t      myNameRef.current = username;\n258\t      myKeyRef.current = privData.password;\n259\t\n260\t      // Загрузка контакта\n261\t      try {\n262\t        const res = await fetch(`${ip}/contact?myUsername=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`);\n263\t        if (res.ok) {\n264\t          const data = await res.json();\n265\t          theirKeyRef.current = data.publicKey;\n266\t          if (!dead) setContactName(data.username);\n267\t        }\n268\t      } catch {}\n269\t\n270\t      // SignalR\n271\t      conn = new HubConnectionBuilder()\n272\t        .withUrl(`${ip}/chathub?username=${encodeURIComponent(username)}`, {\n273\t          accessTokenFactory: () => tokenData.password,\n274\t          headers: { username },\n275\t        })\n276\t        .withAutomaticReconnect([0, 2000, 5000, 10000, 30000])\n277\t        .build();\n278\t\n279\t      conn.on('ReceiveMessage', async (_sender: string, raw: string) => {\n280\t        if (dead || !theirKeyRef.current) return;\n281\t\n282\t        const cm = raw.match(/^__CHUNK__(.+?)__(\\d+)__(\\d+)__/);\n283\t        if (cm) {\n284\t          const [hdr, msgId, idxS, totS] = cm;\n285\t          const idx = +idxS, tot = +totS;\n286\t          const data = raw.slice(hdr.length);\n287\t          const buf = chunksRef.current;\n288\t          if (!buf.has(msgId)) buf.set(msgId, Array(tot).fill(''));\n289\t          buf.get(msgId)![idx] = data;\n290\t          if (buf.get(msgId)!.every(c => c !== '')) {\n291\t            const full = buf.get(msgId)!.join('');\n292\t            buf.delete(msgId);\n293\t            const plain = decryptPayload(full, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n294\t            if (plain) handleIncoming(plain);\n295\t          }\n296\t        } else {\n297\t          const plain = decryptPayload(raw, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n298\t          if (plain) handleIncoming(plain);\n299\t        }\n300\t      });\n301\t\n302\t      conn.onreconnecting(() => { if (!dead) setConnected(false); });\n303\t      conn.onreconnected(() => { if (!dead) setConnected(true); });\n304\t      conn.onclose(() => { if (!dead) setConnected(false); });\n305\t\n306\t      try {\n307\t        await conn.start();\n308\t        if (dead) { conn.stop(); return; }\n309\t        connRef.current = conn;\n310\t        setConnected(true);\n311\t      } catch {}\n312\t    })();\n313\t\n314\t    return () => { dead = true; conn?.stop().catch(() => {}); connRef.current = null; };\n315\t  }, []); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n316\t\n317\t  // --- Отправка текста ---\n318\t  const handleSendText = useCallback(async () => {\n319\t    const t = text.trim();\n320\t    if (!t) return;\n321\t    setText('');\n322\t\n323\t    addMessage({ id: `out-${Date.now()}`, text: t, fromMe: true, timestamp: Date.now() });\n324\t\n325\t    const conn = connRef.current;\n326\t    if (!conn || conn.state !== HubConnectionState.Connected || !theirKeyRef.current) return;\n327\t\n328\t    try {\n329\t      const enc = encryptPayload(t, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n330\t      await sendChunked(conn, myNameRef.current, contactName, enc);\n331\t    } catch (e) {\n332\t      console.error('[Send] error:', e);\n333\t    }\n334\t  }, [text, contactName, addMessage]);\n335\t\n336\t  // --- Отправка медиа ---\n337\t  const handleSendMedia = useCallback(async () => {\n338\t    try {\n339\t      const media = await pickMedia();\n340\t      if (!media) return;\n341\t\n342\t      setSending(true);\n343\t\n344\t      addMessage({\n345\t        id: `out-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n346\t        text: '',\n347\t        image: media.type === 'image' ? media.uri : undefined,\n348\t        video: media.type === 'video' ? media.uri : undefined,\n349\t        fromMe: true,\n350\t        timestamp: Date.now(),\n351\t      });\n352\t\n353\t      const conn = connRef.current;\n354\t      if (!conn || conn.state !== HubConnectionState.Connected || !theirKeyRef.current) {\n355\t        setSending(false);\n356\t        return;\n357\t      }\n358\t\n359\t      const enc = encryptPayload(media.dataUri, theirKeyRef.current, myKeyRef.current);\n360\t      await sendChunked(conn, myNameRef.current, contactName, enc);\n361\t      setSending(false);\n362\t    } catch (e) {\n363\t      console.error('[Media] error:', e);\n364\t      setSending(false);\n365\t    }\n366\t  }, [contactName, addMessage]);\n367\t\n368\t  // --- Длинное нажатие (сохранить в галерею) ---\n369\t  const handleLongPress = useCallback((msg: ChatMessage) => {\n370\t    const uri = msg.image || msg.video;\n371\t    if (!uri || !uri.startsWith('file://')) return;\n372\t    Alert.alert('Сохранить в галерею?', '', [\n373\t      { text: 'Отмена', style: 'cancel' },\n374\t      { text: 'Сохранить', onPress: () => saveToGallery(uri) },\n375\t    ]);\n376\t  }, []);\n377\t\n378\t  // --- Очистка ---\n379\t  const handleClear = useCallback(() => {\n380\t    Alert.alert('Удалить историю?', 'Все сообщения будут удалены', [\n381\t      { text: 'Отмена', style: 'cancel' },\n382\t      { text: 'Удалить', style: 'destructive', onPress: () => { setMessages([]); storage.delete(MESSAGES_KEY); } },\n383\t    ]);\n384\t  }, []);\n385\t\n386\t  // --- Рендер сообщения ---\n387\t  const renderItem = useCallback(({ item }: ListRenderItemInfo<ChatMessage>) => {\n388\t    const isMe = item.fromMe;\n389\t    return (\n390\t      <TouchableOpacity\n391\t        activeOpacity={0.8}\n392\t        onLongPress={() => handleLongPress(item)}\n393\t        style={[styles.msgRow, isMe ? styles.msgRowRight : styles.msgRowLeft]}\n394\t      >\n395\t        <View style={[styles.bubble, isMe ? styles.bubbleRight : styles.bubbleLeft]}>\n396\t          {item.image && (\n397\t            <TouchableOpacity onPress={() => setViewImage(item.image!)} activeOpacity={0.9}>\n398\t              <Image source={{ uri: item.image }} style={styles.msgImage} resizeMode=\"cover\" />\n399\t            </TouchableOpacity>\n400\t          )}\n401\t          {item.video && (\n402\t            <View style={styles.videoWrap}>\n403\t              <Video\n404\t                source={{ uri: item.video }}\n405\t                style={styles.msgVideo}\n406\t                resizeMode=\"contain\"\n407\t                controls\n408\t                paused\n409\t              />\n410\t            </View>\n411\t          )}\n412\t          {!!item.text && (\n413\t            <Text style={[styles.msgText, isMe ? styles.msgTextRight : styles.msgTextLeft]}>\n414\t              {item.text}\n415\t            </Text>\n416\t          )}\n417\t          <Text style={[styles.msgTime, isMe ? styles.msgTimeRight : styles.msgTimeLeft]}>\n418\t            {new Date(item.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })}\n419\t          </Text>\n420\t        </View>\n421\t      </TouchableOpacity>\n422\t    );\n423\t  }, [handleLongPress]);\n424\t\n425\t  // --- РЕНДЕР ---\n426\t  const content = (\n427\t    <View style={[styles.container, { paddingTop: insets.top }]}>\n428\t      {/* Header */}\n429\t      <View style={styles.header}>\n430\t        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleClear} style={styles.clearBtn}>\n431\t          <Text style={styles.clearBtnText}>X</Text>\n432\t        </TouchableOpacity>\n433\t        <Text style={styles.headerTitle} numberOfLines={1}>\n434\t          {contactName || 'Ожидание...'}\n435\t        </Text>\n436\t        {connected\n437\t          ? <View style={styles.dotOnline} />\n438\t          : <ActivityIndicator size=\"small\" color=\"#E91E63\" />\n439\t        }\n440\t      </View>\n441\t\n442\t      {/* Индикатор отправки */}\n443\t      {sending && (\n444\t        <View style={styles.sendingBar}>\n445\t          <ActivityIndicator size=\"small\" color=\"#E91E63\" />\n446\t          <Text style={styles.sendingBarText}>Отправка...</Text>\n447\t        </View>\n448\t      )}\n449\t\n450\t      {/* Список сообщений */}\n451\t      <FlatList\n452\t        ref={flatListRef}\n453\t        data={messages}\n454\t        renderItem={renderItem}\n455\t        keyExtractor={item => item.id}\n456\t        inverted\n457\t        style={styles.list}\n458\t        contentContainerStyle={styles.listContent}\n459\t        keyboardShouldPersistTaps=\"handled\"\n460\t      />\n461\t\n462\t      {/* Поле ввода */}\n463\t      <View style={[styles.inputBar, { paddingBottom: Math.max(insets.bottom, 8) }]}>\n464\t        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleSendMedia} style={styles.attachBtn}>\n465\t          <Text style={styles.attachBtnText}>+</Text>\n466\t        </TouchableOpacity>\n467\t        <TextInput\n468\t          style={styles.input}\n469\t          value={text}\n470\t          onChangeText={setText}\n471\t          placeholder=\"Сообщение...\"\n472\t          placeholderTextColor=\"#999\"\n473\t          multiline\n474\t          maxLength={5000}\n475\t        />\n476\t        <TouchableOpacity onPress={handleSendText} style={styles.sendBtn}>\n477\t          <Text style={styles.sendBtnText}>E2E</Text>\n478\t        </TouchableOpacity>\n479\t      </View>\n480\t\n481\t      {/* Viewer */}\n482\t      <Modal visible={!!viewImage} transparent animationType=\"fade\" onRequestClose={() => setViewImage(null)}>\n483\t        <View style={styles.viewerBg}>\n484\t          <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={styles.viewerContent} horizontal={false}>\n485\t            <ScrollView horizontal showsHorizontalScrollIndicator={false} contentContainerStyle={{ flex: 1, justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' }}>\n486\t              {viewImage && <Image source={{ uri: viewImage }} style={styles.viewerImage} resizeMode=\"contain\" />}\n487\t            </ScrollView>\n488\t          </ScrollView>\n489\t          <Pressable style={styles.viewerClose} onPress={() => setViewImage(null)}>\n490\t            <Text style={styles.viewerCloseText}>✕</Text>\n491\t          </Pressable>\n492\t        </View>\n493\t      </Modal>\n494\t    </View>\n495\t  );\n496\t\n497\t  // На iOS оборачиваем в KeyboardAvoidingView, на Android adjustResize справляется\n498\t  return (\n499\t    <KeyboardAvoidingView\n500\t      style={{ flex: 1 }}\n501\t      behavior={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 'padding' : 'height'}\n502\t      keyboardVerticalOffset={Platform.OS === 'ios' ? 0 : 0}\n503\t    >\n504\t      {content}\n505\t    </KeyboardAvoidingView>\n506\t  );\n507\t}\n508\t\n509\t// === СТИЛИ ===\n510\tconst styles = StyleSheet.create({\n511\t  container: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: '#FFF9FA' },\n512\t  header: {\n513\t    flexDirection: 'row',\n514\t    alignItems: 'center',\n515\t    paddingVertical: 12,\n516\t    paddingHorizontal: 16,\n517\t    backgroundColor: '#FFF',\n518\t    borderBottomWidth: 1,\n519\t    borderBottomColor: '#F8BBD0',\n520\t  },\n521\t  headerTitle: {\n522\t    flex: 1,\n523\t    fontSize: 17,\n524\t    fontWeight: '600',\n525\t    color: '#212121',\n526\t    textAlign: 'center',\n527\t  },\n528\t  clearBtn: {\n529\t    backgroundColor: '#FCE4EC',\n530\t    borderRadius: 8,\n531\t    paddingHorizontal: 8,\n532\t    paddingVertical: 4,\n533\t  },\n534\t  clearBtnText: { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: '700', color: '#E91E63' },\n535\t  dotOnline: {\n536\t    width: 10,\n537\t    height: 10,\n538\t    borderRadius: 5,\n539\t    backgroundColor: '#4CAF50',\n540\t    marginLeft: 8,\n541\t  },\n542\t  sendingBar: {\n543\t    flexDirection: 'row',\n544\t    alignItems: 'center',\n545\t    justifyContent: 'center',\n546\t    paddingVertical: 6,\n547\t    backgroundColor: '#FCE4EC',\n548\t  },\n549\t  sendingBarText: { marginLeft: 8, fontSize: 12, color: '#E91E63' },\n550\t  list: { flex: 1 },\n551\t  listContent: { paddingHorizontal: 12, paddingVertical: 8 },\n552\t  // Сообщения\n553\t  msgRow: { marginVertical: 3 },\n554\t  msgRowRight: { alignItems: 'flex-end' },\n555\t  msgRowLeft: { alignItems: 'flex-start' },\n556\t  bubble: {\n557\t    maxWidth: '78%',\n558\t    borderRadius: 16,\n559\t    paddingHorizontal: 12,\n560\t    paddingVertical: 8,\n561\t  },\n562\t  bubbleRight: { backgroundColor: '#EC407A', borderBottomRightRadius: 4 },\n563\t  bubbleLeft: { backgroundColor: '#FCE4EC', borderBottomLeftRadius: 4 },\n564\t  msgText: { fontSize: 16, lineHeight: 22 },\n565\t  msgTextRight: { color: '#FFF' },\n566\t  msgTextLeft: { color: '#212121' },\n567\t  msgTime: { fontSize: 11, marginTop: 4 },\n568\t  msgTimeRight: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)', textAlign: 'right' },\n569\t  msgTimeLeft: { color: '#999', textAlign: 'left' },\n570\t  msgImage: { width: 260, height: 260, borderRadius: 12, marginBottom: 4 },\n571\t  videoWrap: {\n572\t    width: 220,\n573\t    height: 160,\n574\t    borderRadius: 12,\n575\t    overflow: 'hidden',\n576\t    backgroundColor: '#000',\n577\t    marginBottom: 4,\n578\t  },\n579\t  msgVideo: { width: '100%', height: '100%' },\n580\t  // Ввод\n581\t  inputBar: {\n582\t    flexDirection: 'row',\n583\t    alignItems: 'flex-end',\n584\t    paddingHorizontal: 8,\n585\t    paddingTop: 8,\n586\t    backgroundColor: '#FFF',\n587\t    borderTopWidth: 1,\n588\t    borderTopColor: '#F8BBD0',\n589\t  },\n590\t  attachBtn: {\n591\t    width: 36,\n592\t    height: 36,\n593\t    borderRadius: 18,\n594\t    backgroundColor: '#FCE4EC',\n595\t    justifyContent: 'center',\n596\t    alignItems: 'center',\n597\t    marginRight: 8,\n598\t    marginBottom: 2,\n599\t  },\n600\t  attachBtnText: { fontSize: 22, color: '#E91E63', fontWeight: '300', marginTop: -2 },\n601\t  input: {\n602\t    flex: 1,\n603\t    fontSize: 16,\n604\t    color: '#212121',\n605\t    maxHeight: 120,\n606\t    paddingVertical: 8,\n607\t    paddingHorizontal: 12,\n608\t    backgroundColor: '#FFF9FA',\n609\t    borderRadius: 20,\n610\t    borderWidth: 1,\n611\t    borderColor: '#F8BBD0',\n612\t  },\n613\t  sendBtn: {\n614\t    backgroundColor: '#E91E63',\n615\t    borderRadius: 18,\n616\t    paddingHorizontal: 14,\n617\t    paddingVertical: 8,\n618\t    marginLeft: 8,\n619\t    marginBottom: 2,\n620\t  },\n621\t  sendBtnText: { color: '#FFF', fontWeight: 'bold', fontSize: 13 },\n622\t  // Viewer\n623\t  viewerBg: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.95)', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' },\n624\t  viewerContent: { flex: 1, width: '100%', justifyContent: 'center', alignItems: 'center' },\n625\t  viewerImage: { width: '100%', height: '80%' },\n626\t  viewerClose: { position: 'absolute', top: 50, right: 20, zIndex: 10, backgroundColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)', borderRadius: 20, { useSafeAreaInsets } from 'react-native-safe-area-context';\nimport Video from 'react-native-video';\nimport { MMKV } from 'react-native-mmkv';\nimport { CameraRoll } from boolean;\n  timestamp: number;\n}\n\n// === КОНСТАНТЫ ===\nconst CHUNK_SIZE = 65000; // 65KB — больше чанки, меньше вызовов\nconst MAX_IMAGE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024;\nconst IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX = 'data:image/';\nconst VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX = 'data:video/';\nconst MESSAGES_KEY = 'chat_messages_v2';\n\n// === ЗАШИФРОВАННОЕ ХРАНИЛИЩЕ ===\nconst storage = new MMKV({\n  id: 'e2ee-chat-v2',\n  encryptionKey: 'e2ee-intimate-app-key-v2',\n});\n\nfunction saveMessages(msgs: ChatMessage[]) {\n  try {\n    const toSave = msgs.slice(0, 300).map(m => ({\n      ...m,\n      // Не храним data URI, только file:// ссылки\n      image: m.image?.startsWith('file://') ? m.image : undefined,\n      video: m.video?.startsWith('file://') ? m.video : undefined,\n    }));\n    storage.set(MESSAGES_KEY, JSON.stringify(toSave));\n  } catch {}\n}\n\nfunction loadMessages(): ChatMessage[] {\n  try {\n    const raw = storage.getString(MESSAGES_KEY);\n    if (!raw) return [];\n    return JSON.parse(raw) as ChatMessage[];\n  } catch { return []; }\n}\n\n// === ШИФРОВАНИЕ (через Buffer, без decodeUTF8 для медиа) ===\nfunction encryptPayload(data: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string {\n  const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n  const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n  const msgBytes = Buffer.from(data, 'utf-8');\n  const nonce = nacl.randomBytes(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n  const encrypted = nacl.box(msgBytes, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n  if (!encrypted) throw new Error('Encryption failed');\n  const full = new Uint8Array(nonce.length + encrypted.length);\n  full.set(nonce);\n  full.set(encrypted, nonce.length);\n  return encodeBase64(full);\n}\n\nfunction decryptPayload(payload: string, theirPubKey: string, mySecKey: string): string | null {\n  try {\n    const full = decodeBase64(payload);\n    const nonce = full.slice(0, nacl.box.nonceLength);\n    const box = full.slice(nacl.box.nonceLength);\n    const theirPub = decodeBase64(theirPubKey);\n    const mySec = decodeBase64(mySecKey);\n    const decrypted = nacl.box.open(box, nonce, theirPub, mySec);\n    if (!decrypted) return null;\n    return Buffer.from(decrypted).toString('utf-8');\n  } catch { return null; }\n}\n\n// === ЧАНКОВАЯ ОТПРАВКА ===\nasync function sendChunked(\n  conn: HubConnection,\n  sender: string,\n  recipient: string,\n  encrypted: string,\n): Promise<void> {\n  const total = Math.ceil(encrypted.length / CHUNK_SIZE);\n  if (total === 1) {\n    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, encrypted);\n    return;\n  }\n  const id = `${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`;\n  for (let i = 0; i < total; i++) {\n    const chunk = encrypted.slice(i * CHUNK_SIZE, (i + 1) * CHUNK_SIZE);\n    await conn.invoke('SendEncryptedMessage', sender, recipient, `__CHUNK__${id}__${i}__${total}__${chunk}`);\n  }\n}\n\n// === МЕДИА ХЕЛПЕРЫ ===\nasync function saveToTempFile(dataUri: string, prefix: string): Promise<string> {\n  const match = dataUri.match(/^data:([^;]+);base64,(.+)$/s);\n  if (!match) return dataUri;\n  const [, mime, b64] = match;\n  const ext = mime.includes('video') ? 'mp4' : mime.includes('png') ? 'png' : 'jpg';\n  const path = `${RNFS.CachesDirectoryPath}/${prefix}_${Date.now()}.${ext}`;\n  await RNFS.writeFile(path, b64, 'base64');\n  return `file://${path}`;\n}\n\nasync function saveToGallery(uri: string) {\n  try {\n    if (Platform.OS === 'android' && Platform.Version < 33) {\n      const granted = await PermissionsAndroid.request(\n        PermissionsAndroid.PERMISSIONS.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,\n      );\n      if (granted !== PermissionsAndroid.RESULTS.GRANTED) {\n        Alert.alert('Нет разрешения');\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n    await CameraRoll.saveAsset(uri, { type: 'auto' });\n    Alert.alert('Сохранено в галерею');\n  } catch {\n    Alert.alert('Не удалось сохранить');\n  }\n}\n\nasync function pickMedia(): Promise<{ uri: string; dataUri: string; type: 'image' | 'video' } | null> {\n  const result = await launchImageLibrary({\n    mediaType: 'mixed',\n    quality: 0.6,\n    includeBase64: true,\n    maxWidth: 1024,\n    maxHeight: 1024,\n    videoQuality: 'low',\n  });\n  if (result.didCancel || result.errorCode) return null;\n  const asset: Asset | undefined = result.assets?.[0];\n  if (!asset) return null;\n\n  const isVideo = asset.type?.startsWith('video/') ?? false;\n\n  if (!isVideo && asset.fileSize && asset.fileSize > MAX_IMAGE_SIZE) {\n    Alert.alert('Фото слишком большое (макс 5 МБ)');\n    return null;\n  }\n\n  let dataUri: string;\n  if (!isVideo && asset.base64) {\n    dataUri = `data:${asset.type || 'image/jpeg'};base64,${asset.base64}`;\n  } else if (asset.uri) {\n    const b64 = await RNFS.readFile(asset.uri, 'base64');\n    const mime = asset.type || (isVideo ? 'video' : 'image' };\n}\n\n// === КОМПОНЕНТ ===\nexport default function ChatScreen(): React.JSX.Element {\n  const insets = useSafeAreaInsets();\n  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);\n  const [text, setText] = useState('');\n  const [connected, setConnected] = useState(false);\n  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);\n  const [contactName, setContactName] = useState('');\n  const [viewImage, setViewImage] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  const connRef = useRef<HubConnection | null>(null);\n  const myKeyRef = useRef('');\n  const myNameRef = useRef('');\n  const theirKeyRef = useRef('');\n  const chunksRef = useRef<Map<string, string[]>>(new Map());\n  const flatListRef = useRef<FlatList>(null);\n\n  // --- Добавить сообщение ---\n  const addMessage = useCallback((msg: ChatMessage) => {\n    setMessages(prev => {\n      const next = [msg, ...prev];\n      saveMessages(next);\n      return next;\n    });\n  }, []);\n\n  // --- Обработка входящего ---\n  const handleIncoming = useCallback(async (plainText: string) => {\n    const isImg = plainText.startsWith(IMAGE_DATA_PREFIX);\n    const isVid = plainText.startsWith(VIDEO_DATA_PREFIX);\n\n    let image: string | undefined;\n    let video: string | undefined;\n\n    if (isImg) {\n      image = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_img');\n    } else if (isVid) {\n      video = await saveToTempFile(plainText, 'rcv_vid');\n    }\n\n    addMessage({\n      id: `in-${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`,\n      text: isImg || isVid ? .withAutomaticReconnect([0, 2000, 5000, 10000, 30000])\n        .build();\n\n      conn.on('ReceiveMessage', async (_sender: string, raw: string) => {\n        if (dead || !theirKeyRef.current) Проблема с видео скорее всего в том, что:\n\n1. `pickMedia` читает видео через `RNFS.readFile(asset.uri, 'base64')` - это может быть очень медленным или не работать для больших файлов\n2. Размер видео в base64 может быть ОГРОМНЫМ (например 10MB видео = ~13MB base64)\n3. SignalR может иметь ограничения на размер сообщений\n\nРешение для видео:\n1. Но это требует изменений на сервере.\n\nАльтернатива - оптимизировать текущий подход:\n1. Для видео использовать меньший chunk size\n2. Читать файл частями вместо целиком\n3. Увеличить таймауты\n\nНо основная проблема - SignalR плохо подходит для больших бинарных данных. Правильное решение - HTTP upload.\n\nПосмотрю, что можно сделать без изменения сервера. Можно:\n1. Возможно проблема в том, что nacl.box работает только с текстом, а для бинарных данных нужен nacl.secretbox\n\nНо nacl.box работает с произвольными байтами, так что это не проблема.\n\n\nНужно проверить, поддерживает ли SignalR ограничения на размер сообщений. Крупные файлы лучше передавать через HTTP POST, но если сервер не меняется, придётся работать с тем что есть. Стоит попробовать увеличить CHUNK_SIZE до 200KB вместо 65KB и читать файл небольшими частями через потоковое чтение, чтобы избежать проблем с памятью.\n\nОптимальный подход - читать файл порциями по 200KB и отправлять каждую часть отдельно. Для поддержки прогресса можно добавить индикатор состояния. Проблема в том, что nacl.box требует полные данные для шифрования, но nacl.secretbox работает с потоком и требует только длину nonce.\n\nОднако текущая реализация использует nacl.box с публичным ключом получателя, что правильно для E2E шифрования. Nac\nl.box создаёт зашифрованное сообщение, которое может быть расшифровано только получателем с соответствующим приватным ключом. Проблема в том, что SignalR ограничивает размер отдельных сообщений примерно до 32KB, поэтому большие видео требуют chunking. Для обработки медиафайлов лучше создать отдельный эндпоинт загрузки, но если сервер недоступен, можно работать с chunking-подходом, увеличив размер chunks до 30KB и убедившись, что SignalR настроен на поддержку этого размера.\n\nДля решения проблемы читаю файл небольшими порциями, шифрую каждую и отправляю как chunks. Когда все части собраны, расшифровываю и сохраняю. Однако это требует изменений в pickMedia, handleSendMedia и добавления receiveChunks в handleIncoming.\n\nВместо этого использую секретное шифрование (nacl.secretbox) для потоковой обработки, что позволит читать файл частями без полной загрузки в память и шифровать каждую порцию отдельно.\n\nНо это не сработает с существующим сервером — он ожидает сообщения SignalR, которые не поддерживают потоковую передачу. SignalR ограничен примерно 32KB на сообщение, а 3-4 секунды видео в base64 могут легко превысить этот лимит.\n\nНужен другой подход: читать файл частями по 20KB, шифровать каждую порцию отдельно и передавать через chunks. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n76\t            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n77\t        }\n78\t        else\n79\t        {\n80\t            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Ищем токен. При сокетах SignalR кидает его в access_token\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))\n            token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        // Проверяем по базе\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username) || !_db.Users.Any(u => u.Username == username && u.Token == token))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Неудачная попытка входа. Имя: '{username}'\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        // Отдаем все накопленные сообщения\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n        var actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(actualSender))\n            actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ: {actualSender} хочет написать {targetUsername} ===\");\n\n        if (actualSender != senderUsername) return;\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        var user = OnlineUsers.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Value == Context.ConnectionId);\n        if (user.Key != null)\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(user.Key, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {user.Key} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}","numLines":101,"startLine":1,"totalLines":101}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"53850c54-35fa-40b7-9dba-ecdcf10849c4","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Client_E2EEntim\\E2EEntim_Client","sessionId":"86e71f68-185f-40a6-b5e6-e42efbdaec76","version":"2.1.191","gitBranch":"main"}

Ищем имя в заголовках. Если пусто — ищем в URL Query\n        var username = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username))\n            username = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        // 2. Ищем токен. HubContext { get; private set; }\n\n    private readonly AppDbContext _db;\n\n    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db) => _db = db;\n\n    public override async Task OnConnectedAsync()\n    {\n        HubContext ??= Context;\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n\n        // 1. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        var user = OnlineUsers.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Value == Context.ConnectionId);\n        if (user.Key != null)\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(user.Key, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {user.Key} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":13,"oldLines":11,"newStart":13,"newLines":11,"lines":[" ","     private readonly AppDbContext _db;"," ","-    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db) => _db = db;","-","-    public override async Task OnConnectedAsync()","+    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db)","     {","-        HubContext ??= Context;","+        _db = db;","+        HubContext ??= Context as IHubContext<ChatHub>;","+    }","         var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();"," ","         // 1. HubContext { get; private set; }\n\n    private readonly AppDbContext _db;\n\n    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db)\n    {\n        _db = db;\n        HubContext ??= Context as IHubContext<ChatHub>;\n    }\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n\n        // 1. Ищем имя в заголовках. Если пусто — ищем в URL Query\n        var username = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username))\n            username = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        // 2. Ищем токен. При сокетах SignalR кидает его в access_token\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))\n            token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        // Проверяем по базе\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username) || !_db.Users.Any(u => u.Username == username && u.Token == token))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Неудачная попытка входа. Имя: '{username}'\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        // Отдаем все накопленные сообщения\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n        var actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(actualSender))\n            actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ: {actualSender} хочет написать {targetUsername} ===\");\n\n        if (actualSender != senderUsername) return;\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        var user = OnlineUsers.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Value == Context.ConnectionId);\n        if (user.Key != null)\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(user.Key, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {user.Key} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":2,"oldLines":6,"newStart":2,"newLines":7,"lines":[" using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;"," using E2EEIntim.Data;"," using E2EEIntim.Models;","+using E2EEIntim.Services;"," using System.Collections.Concurrent;"," "," namespace E2EEIntim.Hubs;"]},{"oldStart":9,"oldLines":14,"newStart":10,"newLines":14,"lines":[" public class ChatHub : Hub"," {","     public static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> OnlineUsers = new();","-    public static IHubContext<ChatHub>? Ищем токен. При сокетах SignalR кидает его в access_token\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))\n            token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        // Проверяем по базе\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username) || !_db.Users.Any(u => u.Username == username && u.Token == token))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Неудачная попытка входа. Имя: '{username}'\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n        var actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(actualSender))\n            actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ: {actualSender} хочет написать {targetUsername} ===\");\n\n        if (actualSender != senderUsername) return;\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        var user = OnlineUsers.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Value == Context.ConnectionId);\n        if (user.Key != null)\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(user.Key, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {user.Key} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":1,"oldLines":4,"newStart":1,"newLines":4,"lines":["-﻿using Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR;","+using Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR;"," using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;"," using E2EEIntim.Data;"," using E2EEIntim.Models;"]},{"oldStart":19,"oldLines":19,"newStart":19,"newLines":19,"lines":["         _hubAccessor = hubAccessor;","         _hubAccessor.HubContext ??= Context;","     }","+","+    public override async Task OnConnectedAsync()","+    {","         var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();"," ","-        // 1. Ищем имя в заголовках. Если пусто — ищем в URL Query\n        var username = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username))\n            username = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        // 2. Ищем токен. При сокетах SignalR кидает его в access_token\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))\n            token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        // Проверяем по базе\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(username) || !_db.Users.Any(u => u.Username == username && u.Token == token))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Неудачная попытка входа. Имя: '{username}'\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        // Отдаем все накопленные сообщения\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n        var actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"username\"].ToString();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(actualSender))\n            actualSender = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"username\"].ToString();\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ: {actualSender} хочет написать {targetUsername} ===\");\n\n        if (actualSender != senderUsername) return;\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        var user = OnlineUsers.FirstOrDefault(x => x.Value == Context.ConnectionId);\n        if (user.Key != null)\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(user.Key, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {user.Key} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}","userModified":false},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"561f9e14-a0e9-42d7-a843-05e1b2ac7d8f","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Client_E2EEntim\\E2EEntim_Client","sessionId":"86e71f68-185f-40a6-b5e6-e42efbdaec76","version":"2.1.191","gitBranch":"main"}

Места снова свободны.\");\n});\n\napp.MapGet(\"/messages/{username}\", async (string username, AppDbContext db) =>\n{\n    var messages = await db.Messages\n        .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n        .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n        .ToListAsync();\n\n    db.Messages.RemoveRange(messages);\n    await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n\n    return Results.Ok(messages);\n});\n\n// === FILE UPLOAD/DOWNLOAD ===\napp.MapPost(\"/upload/{targetUsername}\", async (string targetUsername, HttpContext context, AppDbContext db) =>\n{\n    var sender = context.Request.Headers[\"X-Sender\"].ToString();\n    var authToken = context.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n\n    if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(sender)) return Results.BadRequest(\"Missing sender\");\n    if (!db.Users.Any(u => u.Username == sender && u.Token == authToken))\n        return Results.Unauthorized();\n\n    var file = context.Request.Form.Files.FirstOrDefault();\n    if (file == null) return Results.BadRequest(\"No file\");\n\n    var fileId = Guid.NewGuid().ToString(\"N\");\n    var ext = Path.GetExtension(file.FileName) ?? \".bin\";\n    var filePath = Path.Combine(filesPath, $\"{fileId}{ext}\");\n\n    using (var stream = new FileStream(filePath, FileMode.Create))\n        await file.CopyToAsync(stream);\n\n    var mediaId = $\"__MEDIA__{fileId}__{ext.TrimStart('.')}__\";\n\n    if (ChatHub.OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n    {\n        var hubCtx = app.Services.GetRequiredService<HubContextAccessor>();\n        await hubCtx.HubContext!.Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", sender, mediaId);\n    }\n    else\n    {\n        db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n        {\n            SenderUsername = sender,\n            ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n            Payload = mediaId\n        });\n        await db.SaveChangesAsync();\n    }\n\n    return Results.Ok(new { id = fileId, type = ext.TrimStart('.') });\n});\n\n// Serve uploaded files\napp.MapGet(\"/file/{fileId}\", (string fileId) =>\n{\n    var file = Directory.GetFiles(filesPath).FirstOrDefault(f => Path.GetFileName(f).StartsWith(fileId));\n    if (file == null) return Results.NotFound();\n    return Results.File(file);\n});\n\napp.MapHub<ChatHub>(\"/chathub\", options =>\n{\n    options.Transports = Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.Connections.HttpTransportType.WebSockets |\n                         Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.Connections.HttpTransportType.LongPolling;\n});\n\napp.MapGet(\"/\", () => \"Strict E2EE Server is running.\");\n\napp.Run();\n\npublic record RegisterRequest(string Username, string PublicKey);","numLines":177,"startLine":1,"totalLines":177}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"1420aae5-8ea1-4eee-a091-fa29641a6ccc","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Client_E2EEntim\\E2EEntim_Client","sessionId":"86e71f68-185f-40a6-b5e6-e42efbdaec76","version":"2.1.191","gitBranch":"main"}

However, looking at the client code, when a video is sent:\n\n1. Client encrypts video with symmetric key\n2. Client encrypts symmetric key with recipient's public key  \n3. Client uploads encrypted video to /upload\n4. Server sends __MEDIA__id__type__ via SignalR\n5. Client expects __VIDKEY__ to download and decrypt\n\nBut the server sends __MEDIA__, not __VIDKEY__! The server's /upload endpoint also sends a __MEDIA__ message. So the recipient would receive BOTH:\n1. __MEDIA__ from server (wrong, the client expects __VIDKEY__)\n2. __VIDKEY__ from client directly via SignalR\n\nThis is the problem! The server sends __MEDIA__ but the client expects __VIDKEY__ for encrypted videos.\n\nFix: The server should send __VIDKEY__ for encrypted files, not __MEDIA__. But the server doesn't know if the file is encrypted or not. \n\nI could have the client NOT send __VIDKEY__ and instead have the server send it, but the server can't encrypt the symmetric key since it doesn't have the recipient's private key.
