Имя: '{username}'\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        ConnectionUsers[Context.ConnectionId] = username;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        var actualSender = ConnectionUsers.GetValueOrDefault(Context.ConnectionId);\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ: {actualSender} хочет написать {targetUsername} ===\");\n\n        if (actualSender != senderUsername) return;\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        if (ConnectionUsers.TryRemove(Context.ConnectionId, out var username))\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(username, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {username} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}\n","numLines":99,"startLine":1,"totalLines":99}},"sourceToolAssistantUUID":"7ed25119-9a5f-4e9b-9213-1d1cb0e5f44f","userType":"external","entrypoint":"claude-vscode","cwd":"c:\\Client_E2EEntim\\E2EEntim_Client","sessionId":"86e71f68-185f-40a6-b5e6-e42efbdaec76","version":"2.1.191","gitBranch":"main"}

Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        if (ConnectionUsers.TryRemove(Context.ConnectionId, out var username))\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(username, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {username} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":63,"oldLines":11,"newStart":63,"newLines":18,"lines":["     public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)","     {","         var actualSender = ConnectionUsers.GetValueOrDefault(Context.ConnectionId);","+        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ ===\");","+        Console.WriteLine($\"  ConnectionId: {Context.ConnectionId}\");","+        Console.WriteLine($\"  ActualSender: {actualSender}\");","+        Console.WriteLine($\"  RequestedSender: {senderUsername}\");","+        Console.WriteLine($\"  Target: {targetUsername}\");","+        Console.WriteLine($\"  Payload length: {encryptedPayload?.Length ?? 0}\");"," ","-        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ: {actualSender} хочет написать {targetUsername} ===\");","+        if (actualSender != senderUsername) {","+            Console.WriteLine($\"  [ОТКАЗ] sender mismatch!\");","+            return;","+        }"," ","-        if (actualSender != senderUsername) return;","-","         if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))","         {","             Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. private readonly AppDbContext _db;\n\n    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db)\n    {\n        _db = db;\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnConnectedAsync()\n    {\n        var httpContext = Microsoft.AspNetCore.SignalR;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing E2EEIntim.Data;\nusing E2EEIntim.Models;\nusing System.Collections.Concurrent;\n\nnamespace E2EEIntim.Hubs;\n\npublic class ChatHub : Hub\n{\n    public static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> OnlineUsers = new();\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> ConnectionUsers = new();\n    private readonly AppDbContext _db;\n\n    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db)\n    {\n        _db = db;\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnConnectedAsync()\n    {\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n\n        // SignalR передаёт accessToken в заголовке Authorization или Query\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))\n            token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token)) {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Нет токена\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Находим пользователя по токену\n        var user = _db.Users.FirstOrDefault(u => u.Token == token);\n        if (user == null) {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Неверный токен\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        var username = user.Username;\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        ConnectionUsers[Context.ConnectionId] = username;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        var actualSender = ConnectionUsers.GetValueOrDefault(Context.ConnectionId);\n        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ ===\");\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  ConnectionId: {Context.ConnectionId}\");\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  ActualSender: {actualSender}\");\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  RequestedSender: {senderUsername}\");\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  Target: {targetUsername}\");\n        Console.WriteLine($\"  Payload length: {encryptedPayload?.Length ?? 0}\");\n\n        if (actualSender != senderUsername) {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"  [ОТКАЗ] sender mismatch!\");\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. Доставляем мгновенно.\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФЛАЙН] Получатель не в сети. Сохраняем в БД.\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        if (ConnectionUsers.TryRemove(Context.ConnectionId, out var username))\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(username, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {username} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n    }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":67,"oldLines":27,"newStart":67,"newLines":17,"lines":[" ","     public async Task SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)","     {","-        var actualSender = ConnectionUsers.GetValueOrDefault(Context.ConnectionId);","-        Console.WriteLine($\"=== ПОПЫТКА ОТПРАВКИ ===\");","-        Console.WriteLine($\"  ConnectionId: {Context.ConnectionId}\");","-        Console.WriteLine($\"  ActualSender: {actualSender}\");","-        Console.WriteLine($\"  RequestedSender: {senderUsername}\");","-        Console.WriteLine($\"  Target: {targetUsername}\");","-        Console.WriteLine($\"  Payload length: {encryptedPayload?.Length ?? 0}\");","+        Console.WriteLine($\"[SEND] {senderUsername} -> {targetUsername}, len={encryptedPayload?.Length ?? 0}\");"," ","-        if (actualSender != senderUsername) {","-            Console.WriteLine($\"  [ОТКАЗ] sender mismatch!\");","-            return;","-        }","-","+        // Просто отправляем без проверки - SignalR уже проверил токен при коннекте","         if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))","         {","-            Console.WriteLine($\"[УСПЕХ] Получатель в сети. ChatHub : Hub\n{\n    public static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> OnlineUsers = new();\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> ConnectionUsers = new();\n    private readonly AppDbContext _db;\n\n    public ChatHub(AppDbContext db)\n    {\n        _db = db;\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnConnectedAsync()\n    {\n        var httpContext = Context.GetHttpContext();\n\n        // SignalR передаёт accessToken в заголовке Authorization или Query\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Headers[\"Authorization\"].ToString().Replace(\"Bearer \", \"\").Trim();\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))\n            token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token)) {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Нет токена\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Находим пользователя по токену\n        var user = _db.Users.FirstOrDefault(u => u.Token == token);\n        if (user == null) {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Неверный токен\");\n            Context.Abort();\n            return;\n        }\n\n        var username = user.Username;\n        OnlineUsers[username] = Context.ConnectionId;\n        ConnectionUsers[Context.ConnectionId] = username;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОЧЕРЕДЬ] Выгружаем {pendingMessages.Count} сообщений для {username}\");\n            foreach (var msg in pendingMessages)\n            {\n                await Clients.Caller.SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", msg.SenderUsername, msg.Payload);\n            }\n\n            _db.Messages.RemoveRange(pendingMessages);\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n\n        await base.OnConnectedAsync();\n    }\n\n    public async Task<string> SendEncryptedMessage(string senderUsername, string targetUsername, string encryptedPayload)\n    {\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[SEND] {senderUsername} -> {targetUsername}, len={encryptedPayload?.Length ?? 0}\");\n\n        if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[SEND] Получатель онлайн\");\n            await Clients.Client(connectionId).SendAsync(\"ReceiveMessage\", senderUsername, encryptedPayload);\n        }\n        else\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[SEND] Получатель офлайн\");\n            _db.Messages.Add(new EncryptedMessage\n            {\n                SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                Payload = encryptedPayload\n            });\n            await _db.SaveChangesAsync();\n        }\n        return \"ok\";\n    }\n\n    public override async Task OnDisconnectedAsync(Exception? ex)\n    {\n        if (ConnectionUsers.TryRemove(Context.ConnectionId, out var username))\n        {\n            OnlineUsers.TryRemove(username, out _);\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОФФЛАЙН] {username} покинул чат.\");\n        }\n        await base.OnDisconnectedAsync(ex);\n ChatHub : Hub\n{\n    public static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> OnlineUsers = new();\n    private static readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, string> ConnectionUsers = new();\n Context.GetHttpContext();\n\n        // SignalR передаёт accessToken в заголовке Authorization или Query\n        var token = httpContext?.Request.Query[\"access_token\"].ToString();\n\n        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token)) {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[ОТКАЗ] Нет токена\");\n            Context.Abort();\n Context.ConnectionId;\n        ConnectionUsers[Context.ConnectionId] = username;\n        Console.WriteLine($\"[ОНЛАЙН] Пользователь {username} зашел в чат!\");\n\n        var pendingMessages = await _db.Messages\n            .Where(m => m.ReceiverUsername == username)\n            .OrderBy(m => m.CreatedAt)\n            .ToListAsync();\n\n        if (pendingMessages.Any())\n        {\n {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"[SEND] {senderUsername} -> {targetUsername}\");\n\n            if (OnlineUsers.TryGetValue(targetUsername, out var connectionId))\n            {\n EncryptedMessage\n                {\n                    SenderUsername = senderUsername,\n                    ReceiverUsername = targetUsername,\n                    Payload = encryptedPayload\n
